t_ch: 谢、谢谢…那孩子，还有我兄弟…拜、拜托你们了！
t_en: Thank you! Please bring them back to safety!

t_ch: 不…不好了！有、有怪物向这边来了！
t_en: Oh no! Monsters are coming this way!

t_ch: 战斗的事就交给我们——你们快撤！
t_en: Leave the battle to us, you need to fall back!

t_ch: 明、明白了…多谢各位救命之恩！
t_en: O—Okay! Thank you for saving us!

t_ch: 继续向前搜索失散的女孩子和矿民吧。
t_en: Let's keep searching for the missing girl and the miner.

t_ch: 总觉得…是不是有点冷？
t_en: Is it me or is it... cold here?

t_ch: 呜、呜呜……
t_en: Oh... *sob*

t_ch: 他们有危险，我们快上！
t_en: They're in danger, let's go!

t_ch: 那对姐弟有危险，我们清理掉怪物再前进！
t_en: They need our help. We have to deal with these monsters first before advancing further.

t_ch: 你们两个——这里太危险了，快去矿区大桥！那里会有铁卫和「地火」的人保护你们。
t_en: You two! It's too dangerous here. Find the Silvermane Guards and Wildfire at the bridge — they'll protect you.

t_ch: 好、好的…！谢谢你，谢谢你们！
t_en: O—Okay...! Thank you, thank you!

t_ch: 齐诺——抓住姐姐的手，我们快离开这里！
t_en: Zino, take my hand! Let's get out of here!

t_ch: 呜呜，这里好冷…好可怕……
t_en: *sob* It's so cold here... I'm scared...

t_ch: …怪物似乎变得难对付了。同类的怪物以往绝对没有这么难缠……
t_en: ...The monsters have gotten stronger somehow. I don't remember them being this difficult...

t_ch: 还好我们及时赶到。要是再晚点，真不知道那对姐弟俩会出什么事……
t_en: Thank goodness we got here in time. If we'd arrived any later...

t_ch: 那个小姑娘…很勇敢。跟你当年很像。
t_en: That's one brave little girl... You were like that at her age too.

t_ch: …哈？不至于不至于，老爸他确实总是凶巴巴的，但和裂界里的怪物还是比不了吧？
t_en: Huh? I wouldn't go that far — I only had Dad to deal with. He could be fierce, but nothing like the monsters here.

t_ch: 再说，我烦他的原因也不是因为他太过严厉……
t_en: Besides, my problem with him wasn't that he was a strict father...

t_ch: 我只是觉得难以置信，他竟然能不假思索地执行可可利亚的封锁令……
t_en: I just couldn't believe that he never lifted a finger to oppose Cocolia's order to seal the passageway...

t_ch: ——昨天还宣誓要守护的人，隔了一晚就活该被放弃…什么家规，真可笑。
t_en: Vowing to protect the Underworlders in one breath, and then deciding they deserved to be abandoned in the next... "Family code of conduct" — what a joke.

t_ch: 爸爸是名军人。军人不该过度解读命令……
t_en: Father was a soldier. He wasn't supposed to question the orders from his superiors...

t_ch: …算了，我知道替他说话只会让你更生气。至少…至少现在我们有机会做正确的事。
t_en: ...Never mind. I know I sound like I'm defending him, and I don't want to make you angry. At least now we've got the chance to right the wrongs.

t_ch: …呵，越想越气。我选择离家出走真是个无比正确的决定。
t_en: Hmph, I'm angry just thinking about it. Looking back, I'm glad I left home early.

t_ch: 光靠逃避解决不了问题。你离开家里这么久，一听到他的事却还是会生气——这说明你还没有完全放下。
t_en: Running away doesn't solve the problem. It's been ages since you two had those fights, but you still can't let it go... You need to walk out of his shadow.

t_ch: 我无意干涉你的选择。我只希望这是你彻底想清楚后做出的决定…而不是把它当作逃避的手段。
t_en: I'm not trying to change your mind. I just want to know that your choice to leave this planet is a result of having thought things through, not because you're trying to run away from something.

t_ch: 我的选择……
t_en: My choice...

t_ch: …抱歉，我不该对你说教。
t_en: ...Sorry, I sound like Dad.

t_ch: 嗐，没事！你想说什么我都明白，真的！只是…我还需要些时间仔细想想。
t_en: *sigh* Don't worry about it. I get what you're trying to say, I do! It's just... I need some time.

t_ch: 还是先解决眼下的危机吧。刚才的矿民说，她兄弟也跑来这附近了…四处看看吧？
t_en: Let's focus on the business at hand. That miner we met said his brother came this way — we should look around.

t_ch: 嗯。小心环境，附近的气温明显下降了…这现象着实反常。
t_en: Okay. Be careful though, I sense a drop in temperature. Something's not right.

t_ch: 这次说不定有前所未见的怪物出现，我们多加小心。
t_en: It could mean something we haven't encountered before is waiting for us. Stay on your toes.

t_ch: 呼…真是难缠的怪物。不知道那两个小鬼怎么样了……
t_en: Phew... These monsters are tough. I need to find those kids...

t_ch: 呃…你刚才击退了裂界怪物吗？
t_en: Hey... Did you just scare off a Fragmentum monster?

t_ch: 算，也不算…只是把一个落单的家伙给赶跑了。
t_en: Uhh, kind of... There was one on its own — I managed to chase it away.

t_ch: 话说回来，我看你们来自那个方向——你们有见过两个人吗？是姐弟俩，一大一小……
t_en: Speaking of which, you came from that direction, right? Did you see two little kids? A girl and her brother...?

t_ch: 他们已经退到安全区域了。
t_en: They've retreated to the safe zone.

t_ch: 哈，那就好…我还怕自己追得太远，把他们落下了呢。
t_en: Ah, thank goodness... I chased the monster too far and lost them.

t_ch: 他们被裂界怪物困住了。
t_en: They were surrounded by monsters.

t_ch: 啊？！坏了，我就知道……
t_en: What!? Quick! I knew I shouldn't have—

t_ch: 不必担心，我们已让他们退到了安全区域。
t_en: Easy, they went back to safety.

t_ch: 总之，那对姐弟现在安然无恙。你也快向矿区大桥撤离吧，铁卫联手「地火」在那里建立了安全区。
t_en: They'll be okay now. You should head back to the bridge too — the Guards and Wildfire have set up a safe zone there.

t_ch: 喔、喔！太好了，他俩没事就好…我可以放心撤了。
t_en: Thank you — all of you. I'm just glad they're okay... I can finally retreat as well.

t_ch: 不过，前面似乎有个非常强大的怪物，像是这帮怪物的头儿…你们可得小心哪！
t_en: I heard there's a powerful monster down the road — some kind of leader of the pack... I'd take caution!

t_ch: 感谢你的情报，我们一定会谨慎应战。
t_en: Thanks for the intel. We'll be careful.

t_ch: 看来前面有强敌盘踞…希露瓦，{NICKNAME}，千万小心。
t_en: I think he was right about the monster... Serval, {NICKNAME}, no sudden moves.

t_ch: 那种怪物…我在禁区前线时也与它打过几次照面。
t_en: I've seen this type of monster a few times near the restricted zone.

t_ch: 做好准备，要上了。
t_en: Ready? Here we go.

t_ch: 等等，先保持距离！这个敌人有些不对劲……
t_en: Wait, don't get too close! Something's not right...

t_ch: 咦？怎么了？
t_en: Huh? What is it?

t_ch: 这种怪物的战意通常十分高昂。平时若在裂界中遭遇，激战往往在所难免……
t_en: These monsters are usually eager to fight — you're guaranteed a fierce battle if you see one in the Fragmentum...

t_ch: 但眼前这家伙看到我们后却无动于衷…我担心这其中有诈。
t_en: But this one doesn't seem concerned about us... This could be a trap.

t_ch: 裂界怪物也会使诈？
t_en: A trap laid by a Fragmentum monster? Are they that smart?

t_ch: …倒不是字面意思。我只是觉得情况不同寻常。
t_en: ...I'm not sure either. I just have a feeling that something's different.

t_ch: 怕什么，干就完事了！
t_en: Enough talking, let's get it!

t_ch: 冷静些，{NICKNAME}。情况特殊，我们小心为上……
t_en: Careful, {NICKNAME}. Special circumstances require a special approach.

t_ch: 这附近的空气…唔…好冷……
t_en: The air... it's so cold...
██Stellaron█ ██ promises ██ █ Serval██ █...

t_ch: （它…说话了？）
t_en: (Did it just... talk?)

t_ch: …不要贸然出手，做好反击准备……
t_en: ...Steady, get ready to counter its attack...

t_ch: （…杰帕德听不到它的声音吗？）
t_en: (...Can Gepard not hear that?)
██Gepard█ █Serval█ Landau ██ ███ █...

t_ch: （它刚才…是不是提到了姐弟两人的名字？）
t_en: (Did it just say "Gepard" and "Serval"?)

t_ch: …这家伙，好吵啊！裂界造物居然还会碎碎念吗？
t_en: ...Ugh, that noise! Do Fragmentum monsters usually sound like this?

t_ch: 那怪物…在说话！
t_en: The monster... it's talking!

t_ch: …你们听不到它说的话吗？
t_en: ...It's talking to us. Can you not hear it?

t_ch: …说话？我只听到了一阵杂乱的噪声……
t_en: ...Talking? I just hear white noise...

t_ch: 等等——难道你能理解它的语言？
t_en: Wait... You understand it?

t_ch: …它在重复你们的名字。
t_en: ...It's repeating your names.

t_ch: 杰帕德，希露瓦…
t_en: Gepard, Serval...

t_ch: 我们的名字？为什么……
t_en: Our names? What's happening here...

t_ch: 我听说过民间的传闻——「披上庄严人形的裂界幻影，是往昔守护者的意志凝结成的回响」。
t_en: I heard rumors about this kind of monster... "Shadows in the Fragmentum that assume human forms are echoes of the will of past guardians."

t_ch: 假设传闻是真的，难道……
t_en: If the rumors are true... could it be...

t_ch: 可可利亚……
t_en: Cocolia...

t_ch: 你这女人…真是阴魂不散。
t_en: You... You just won't stop haunting me.

t_ch: 我已经想尽办法努力忘记先前发生的一切了，可你总能变着法子又回到我的视线中……
t_en: I try everything to put the past behind me... and yet you always manage to creep up again...

t_ch: 可可利亚，你这个…混蛋！先是终止我的研究，然后又要破坏我的生活…你还想从我这儿夺走什么？！
t_en: Cocolia, you... you witch! You terminated my research and ruined my life... What else do you want to take away from me!?

t_ch: 希露瓦，冷静！那只是裂界的幻象！
t_en: Calm down, Serval! It's just a Fragmentum illusion!

t_ch: 难道我们一起度过的那些时光…都是虚假的吗？
t_en: All that time we spent together... was any of it real?

t_ch: 你走得倒是潇洒…你难道就不觉得，自己还欠我一个解释吗？！
t_en: It was so easy for you to just leave this world behind... Don't you at least owe me an explanation!?

t_ch: 姐姐！
t_en: Serval!
...██ █Landau██ █ █ stand down!

t_ch: 小心，希露瓦！
t_en: Serval, watch out!

t_ch: █约定的新世界 █ ██ 没有你们的位置——！
t_en: █There is no place for you█ ██the promised new world!

t_ch: 冷静下来，姐姐！我知道你想从可可利亚大人那里得到回应——
t_en: Sister! I know you want Madam Cocolia to respond...

t_ch: 但我们眼前的这个…东西，它只是我们的敌人、只是裂界中成型的恶意罢了！你从它身上找不到答案！
t_en: But this... thing in front of us is our enemy! It was born out of the evil gathered in the Fragmentum! You won't get answers from it!

t_ch: 并肩作战吧，姐姐——我们一起驱散旧日的幻影。
t_en: Fight with us, sister. Let's dispel the shadow of the past once and for all!

t_ch: 当然，如果你还是觉得暂时无法直面自己的种种过去——
t_en: Of course, if you're not yet able to confront the past...

t_ch: 我和{NICKNAME}会暂时代你战斗…直到你将自己的心结彻底解开为止。
t_en: Then {NICKNAME} and I will fight for you... until your heart is ready.

t_ch: 一起来吗？把它痛扁一顿。
t_en: Are you coming with us? Let's take it down!

t_ch: 好好享受你的私人空间吧。
t_en: You need some space. I understand.

t_ch: 哈，你们两个真是……
t_en: Ha, you two...

t_ch: 抱歉啦，老弟。每到关键时刻，我总是要让你费心。
t_en: I'm sorry, brother. I always make you worry when things get serious.

t_ch: 不过嘛，你小子居然也学会激将法了——
t_en: But I see what you're doing... Reverse psychology, huh?

t_ch: 既然话说到这份上……
t_en: Well, seeing as we've come this far...

t_ch: 可可利亚——咱们之间的陈年旧事，就在这里彻底清算吧！
t_en: Cocolia... let's settle this bad blood right here, right now!

t_ch: 看来，前任大守护者的执念确实夹杂其中。
t_en: A supreme guardian's obsession...

t_ch: 太难看了，可可利亚——缠着人不放可不是你的作风啊。
t_en: Hmph, since when did you forget how to let go, Cocolia?
█Serval█S██erval █Ser█ v██ al██ ████ █...
█ ███Why█ █do you█ ██al█ways...
█ ██ have to██stand █ █ ██in my way ███ ██ █...!

t_ch: 温度逐渐恢复正常了。裂界怪物也在逃散。
t_en: The temperature is returning to normal... the monsters are retreating.

t_ch: 可以合理推测…可可利亚大人的幻影就是引发这次入侵的罪魁祸首。先前未知的异变可能也是由它引起的……
t_en: ...I think it's safe to say that the shadow of Madam Cocolia was the reason for this invasion. The other anomalies we experienced were probably also a direct result...

t_ch: 无论如何，这次的危机应该就算告一段落了。你还好吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Whatever the case, we've managed to avert a crisis. Are you okay, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 真是一场艰难的战斗。
t_en: That was a hard-won battle.

t_ch: 的确。好在你战斗经验丰富，能够见招拆招。
t_en: Indeed it was. We're lucky to have an experienced fighter like you who can adapt to different enemies.

t_ch: 就这？我还能打十个！
t_en: That's it? That barely scratched the itch!

t_ch: 不愧是贝洛伯格的英雄。
t_en: Sounds like something the Hero of Belobog would say alright.

t_ch: 如果少了你，恐怕我们还要和那幻影纠缠一阵…姐姐，你还好吗？感觉如何？
t_en: It would've taken us much longer to fight off the shadow without you. Serval... how are you feeling?

t_ch: 感觉…心里的一块石头落地了。
t_en: I feel like something heavy has finally been lifted.

t_ch: 不过，那家伙消散前可真够吵的…{NICKNAME}，你听清楚它说什么了吗？
t_en: All that noise before it perished... {NICKNAME}, did you catch what it said?

t_ch: 它说「你怎么总这么碍事」。
t_en: It said, "Why do you always have to stand in my way?"

t_ch: …原来如此。你真是一条路走到黑了啊，可可利亚……
t_en: I see... You really made no effort to correct your mistakes, Cocolia...

t_ch: 不过，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
t_en: Anyway, it doesn't matter anymore... From here on out, I'm over that woman.

t_ch: 它说…「谢谢你，希露瓦」。
t_en: It said, "Thank you, Serval."

t_ch: …哈，真的吗？
t_en: ...Ha, really?

t_ch: 哎，罢了罢了，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
t_en: *sigh* I guess it doesn't matter. From here on out, I'm over that woman.

t_ch: 我没听清…
t_en: I didn't quite catch it...

t_ch: 这样啊…可惜。
t_en: Oh... shame.

t_ch: 哎，罢了罢了，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
t_en: *sigh* I guess it doesn't matter. From here on out, I'm over that woman.

t_ch: …看来这次是真心话了。
t_en: ...I can tell you mean it this time.

t_ch: 如果你真的能彻底放下执念…那我替你高兴，姐姐。
t_en: I'm happy for you, Serval... It's not easy to truly put the past behind you.

t_ch: 任务到这里就算告一段落了，但我还需要组织铁卫和「地火」进行善后。
t_en: Looks like we accomplished our mission. I need to get back to the Guards and Wildfire to wrap things up.

t_ch: 你们先回娜塔莎小姐的诊所吧，去看看我们救下的伤员情况如何。
t_en: You two should head over to Natasha's place and check in on the wounded.

t_ch: 没问题，那我们之后就在诊所碰头。{NICKNAME}，这儿就交给老弟，我们先回镇上去吧！
t_en: Sure, come find us later at the clinic. {NICKNAME}, let's leave Gepard to his business and head back to town.

t_ch: 躲在我身后，别出来…！
t_en: Quick, get behind me!

t_ch: 呜、呜…爸爸，妈妈……
t_en: *sob* Mom... Dad...

t_ch: 非战斗人员请从这里向磐岩镇撤离！
t_en: Non-combatants, retreat from Boulder Town through here in an orderly fashion!

t_ch: （似乎不能从这里前往战场……）
t_en: (It doesn't seem like we can go to the battlefield through here...)

t_ch: 前方是战斗区域，非战斗人员不得入内！
t_en: Battleground to the fore, non-combatants are not allowed beyond this point!

t_ch: （还是听从杰帕德的指令，不要擅自行动为好……）
t_en: (I should take Gepard's order and not act on my own...)

t_ch: （还是先调查一下这处临时营地吧……）
t_en: (I'll just investigate this temporary camp for now...)

t_ch: 他们怎么还没回来……
t_en: Why are they not back yet...

t_ch: 不知道啊……
t_en: I have no idea...

t_ch: 还不能开火？！
t_en: Can't we open fire yet!?

t_ch: 冷静，不要主动邀战！
t_en: Calm down, don't engage the enemy!

t_ch: 外面危险，快进来！
t_en: It's dangerous outside. Come in!

t_ch: 小心外面的怪物！
t_en: Be careful of the monsters!

t_ch: 外面好多怪物，我害怕……
t_en: There are so many monsters outside, I'm scared...

t_ch: 这是发生什么事了？
t_en: What is going on?

t_ch: 嘶…「地火」怎么还不来？
t_en: Ssss... Why isn't Wildfire here yet?

t_ch: 别慌，冷静点告诉我，后面还有被落下的人吗？有多少，在哪里？
t_en: Calm down, answer me, are there anyone else who's left behind? How many, and where?

t_ch: 有、有不少哩！他们在那个旧矿坑附近搭了个临时阵地……
t_en: Th—There are quite a few of them! They're there at the old mine shaft with a temporary camp...

t_ch: 那里还有小孩和老人…求求你们，快去救他们吧！
t_en: There are children and seniors too... Please, save them!

t_ch: 嘿，这里稀罕宝贝可真不少啊！老弟你不会是嘴上说做义工，其实偷偷在这里寻宝吧？
t_en: Hah, there's plenty of precious stuff in here! You aren't looking for treasure in the museum while pretending to volunteer, right?

t_ch: 不，没这回事……
t_en: No, I'm not...

t_ch: 哎，这是什么机器？还有屏幕跟键盘…难道是操控自动机兵用的终端？
t_en: Oh! What's this gadget? This monitor, and this keyboard... is it an automaton remote control terminal?

t_ch: 你看，这里还贴着纸条呢！「佩妮娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜」……
t_en: See, there's a piece of paper here! It says "Penya Sergeyevna"...

t_ch: 这是物主的名字吗？怎么听着有点熟悉……
t_en: Is that the owner's name? Sounds a bit familiar...

t_ch: …姐姐，这都是文物，你别乱动。万一弄坏了就不好了。
t_en: These are all relics, sis. Please don't touch them. What if you break something?

t_ch: 我来了。
t_en: Here I am.

t_ch: 哟，{NICKNAME}来啦！我们俩正等你呢。
t_en: Oh, {NICKNAME}! We were just waiting for you.

t_ch: 好久不见，{NICKNAME}。我本来提议直接在群里聊，但姐姐坚决不肯…辛苦你特地跑一趟了。
t_en: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}. I wanted to talk about this in our chat group, but sis won't have it... I'm sorry you had to run all the way out here.

t_ch: 到底是什么事？
t_en: More danger afoot?

t_ch: 一定要在这种地方聊吗？
t_en: Why all the hush-hush?

t_ch: 哎…这都是姐姐的主意。她说这样比较有密谋的感觉。
t_en: Um... That was Serval's idea. She said it needed a level of secrecy.

t_ch: 不过我也碰巧在博物馆帮忙，索性就随她在这里等你了。
t_en: I happened to be helping out at the museum, so we both ended up waiting for you here.

t_ch: 其实，这次请你来这里，是想和你聊聊我们家玲可的事。
t_en: Actually, I want to talk to you about our little Lynx.

t_ch: 玲可是谁？
t_en: Lynx?

t_ch: 她是我们俩的妹妹，也是朗道家年纪最小的孩子。
t_en: She's our little sister, the youngest child of the Landau family.

t_ch: 原来是她啊。
t_en: Oh, that Lynx.

t_ch: 原来你们认识啊，那就好说了。
t_en: So you know her! Well, that makes this easy.

t_ch: 她最近刚从雪原科考归来，但状态一直不大好，似乎有什么心事……
t_en: She just came back from a scientific exploration on the Snow Plains, but she seems really out of it... almost like she's worried about something...

t_ch: 她也不想告诉我们到底发生了什么。我们很担心她，想帮她的忙，但又实在毫无头绪。
t_en: And she won't tell us what happened. We're really worried and want to help, but we don't know where to start.

t_ch: 我上次遇见她的时候，她似乎正准备去雪原跟某人见面，还问我要了一套炉具……
t_en: The last time I saw her, she was preparing to meet someone on the Snow Plains. She even asked for a stove set from me...

t_ch: 可不管我们怎么旁敲侧击，她都不肯告诉我到底要去见谁…嗐，我这姐姐当的，真是憋屈。
t_en: But no matter how Gepard and I asked and probed, Lynx simply refused to tell us who she was gonna meet... *sigh* I'm such a failure of a sister.

t_ch: 所以，我和老弟不得已才想了这一招，想请你代我们去侦查一下！
t_en: So, that's why Gepard and I came up with this idea. We'd like you to help us find out what's going on!

t_ch: 还有一个请求…希望你务必不要被她发现，否则玲可肯定又要对我们发脾气了。
t_en: One more thing... don't let her discover you. Otherwise, she'll probably get upset with us.

t_ch: 包在我身上！
t_en: Leave it to me!

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！我们确实是放心不下她随便和陌生人见面……
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}! We're worried about her meeting strangers...

t_ch: 她经常一个人前往雪原考察，我们也一直相信她能保护好自己。但毕竟这次情况特殊——要是她被坏人利用，陷入危险就糟了。
t_en: She's used to doing research alone in the Snow Plains, and we've always believed she can protect herself, but this is different... I'm worried she could run into bad people.

t_ch: 这样不太好吧…
t_en: That might be difficult...

t_ch: 话是这么说，她也确实经常一个人前往雪原考察，我们也一直相信她能保护好自己……
t_en: I know she's used to going into the Snow Plains alone for research, and we've always believed she can protect herself...

t_ch: 但这次情况特殊，我们确实放心不下她随便和陌生人见面——要是她被坏人利用，陷入危险就糟了。
t_en: But this is different. We're worried about her running into strangers... She might get herself into trouble.

t_ch: 哦，对了！你要去找玲宝的话，还得知道她长什么样吧？
t_en: Oh, right! If you're gonna go find Lynxy, you gotta know what she looks like!

t_ch: 放心，她很显眼的：她跟我俩一样，一头金发，然后…唔，个子比较小，平时总会戴一顶白绒帽…如果我没猜错，她应该会在靠近雪原的出入口等人。
t_en: Don't worry. She stands out. She's blonde like us and, um... quite short. She's always wearing a white fur hat... If I'm right, she should be waiting for someone at the city exit closest to the Snow Plains.

t_ch: 总之，我们最可爱的妹妹就拜托你了——要是发现了什么情况，记得随时联系我们啊！
t_en: We are putting our dearest baby sister in your hands this time. Let us know immediately if anything happens.

t_ch: 拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: （哎？那边那个孩子…和希露瓦描述的有点像。）
t_en: (Huh? That girl over there... seems like she fits Serval's description.)

t_ch: （那应该就是玲可了。先在这里观察状况吧。）
t_en: (That must be Lynx. Let's hide here and observe for now.)

t_ch: 玲宝～我来啦。
t_en: Lynxy~ I'm here!

t_ch: 我们出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 佩拉情报官刚才好像和什么人向雪原的方向去了……
t_en: Intelligence Officer Pela just left for the Snow Plains with somebody...

t_ch: 您也要前往雪原吗？
t_en: ...are you headed there too?

t_ch: 前往雪原。
t_en: Enter the Snow Plains.

t_ch: 下次再说。
t_en: Maybe later.

t_ch: 呼…原来从行政区到雪原要花这么久啊。
t_en: Phew... I never knew how long it took to get from the Administrative District to the Snow Plains.

t_ch: 好大的雪…感觉比北方山脉里见到的还要大。
t_en: So much snow... Even in the northern mountains, it wasn't like this.

t_ch: 准备好防寒衣物了吗？
t_en: Did you bring enough warm clothes?

t_ch: 不出意外的话，雪在入夜前还会越下越大…你有好好准备防寒的衣物吗？
t_en: The snow is supposed to get heavier later in the day... Have you got enough warm clothes?

t_ch: 嗯，都按你说的准备好啦。多亏了你的露营手册。
t_en: Yep, I brought everything you told me to — all thanks to your camping guide.

t_ch: 然后，按你手册里说的——我们该找一处合适的露营地了，对吧？平整干燥、背风背阴，还得是地势比较高的地方……
t_en: Speaking of which, according to the guide, the first thing we need to do is find a good place to set up camp, right? Flat, dry, sheltered, facing the sun, high elevation...

t_ch: 要先找一处合适的露营地。
t_en: We need to find a good place to set up camp first.

t_ch: 不出意外的话，雪在入夜前还会越下越大…我们得先找个合适的地方扎营才行。
t_en: The snow is supposed to get heavier later in the day... We need to find a good place to set up camp first.

t_ch: 嗯，我记得这个——你在露营手册上也是这么写的：露营地必须平整干燥、背风背阴，最好是地势较高的地方……
t_en: Right! The guide says we should find a flat, dry, sheltered location — facing the sun at high elevation...

t_ch: …不愧是你，记什么都这么清楚。不过，这附近应该很难找到完美符合所有条件的露营地。
t_en: ...You remembered all that? I expected no less from you! But it's gonna be hard finding a place that fits those criteria.

t_ch: 我们就一起边走边看吧——当然，还得方便观测极光才行。
t_en: Well, we'll just keep moving and see. The place has to be convenient enough for us to observe the aurora, too.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，谢谢玲宝。
t_en: Hehe, thanks, Lynxy!

t_ch: 那就交给你啦——我会乖乖跟着你的。
t_en: I'll leave it to you then. I'm gonna follow right behind you.

t_ch: 平整干燥、背风背阴、地势要高……
t_en: Flat, dry, sheltered, facing the sun, high elevation...

t_ch: 还要方便观测极光…好难挑啊。
t_en: ...and we need to be able to observe the aurora... This is going to be difficult.

t_ch: 这个坡道的视野好像很好…观测极光感觉会很方便欸。
t_en: This slope has a good view... It'll be easy to watch the aurora.

t_ch: 不。这里是风口，还有冰原狼活动的痕迹…在这里扎营会有危险的。
t_en: Nope. The wind blows strongly through here, and there are signs of direwolf activity... It'd be too dangerous to make camp.

t_ch: 原来如此…那我们还是继续向前找找吧。
t_en: I see... Then let's keep moving.

t_ch: 嗯…这里倒是背风背阴，地面也很平整。但……
t_en: Hmm... This area is sheltered and facing the sun, plus it's flat ground, but...

t_ch: 但四周都是山崖，如果遇到落石或者塌方就危险了。而且这里视野也不是很好……
t_en: But there are cliffs all around. We'll be in trouble if there's a landslide or rockfall. Also, there isn't much of a view...

t_ch: …啊！我想到一个好地方——离这里不远，跟紧我。
t_en: Ah! I remember a good place that's not too far from here. Follow me!

t_ch: 咦？…啊，好！
t_en: Huh? ...Okay!

t_ch: 我们好像走进死胡同了……
t_en: We're at a dead end...

t_ch: 难道…玲宝说的「好地方」，就是这里？
t_en: Lynxy, are you sure this is the place?

t_ch: 没错。这里是通向坎特谷的必经之路。虽然两边有矮崖，但我先前已经为了通行方便清理过了，不必担心坍塌。
t_en: Yep. This is the path to Kandor Valley. There are low cliffs on both sides, but I cleared all the monsters here a while ago, so it should be safe and sound.

t_ch: 而且，这个季节的山风通常是北风，这两座矮崖正好可以为我们挡住雪原的强风——这也是不能在刚才坡道上扎营的原因之一。
t_en: Also, the mountain wind during this season usually comes from the north, which is another reason why we couldn't camp on that previous slope. These two hills can block the Snow Plains gales for us.

t_ch: …我完全没注意到这些细节！露营原来这么深奥吗……
t_en: I never even noticed! Huh, camping is a complicated science...

t_ch: …也不是啦，只是贝洛伯格之外的自然条件比较恶劣而已。
t_en: ...Not really, but the environment outside of Belobog is very tough.

t_ch: 如果这里的天气像城里一样好，那只要找个舒服的地方扎营就可以了。
t_en: If the weather here was as good as inside the city, then we could have camped anywhere.

t_ch: 也是。希望那一天能早点到来。
t_en: That's true. I hope that becomes a reality one day.

t_ch: 啊，不过这里的视野似乎不是很好…看极光的话，这里没问题吗？
t_en: Hmm, only problem is... the view here isn't great. Are you sure we'll be able to watch the aurora?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，这个悬念留到最后再揭晓——我们先把帐篷搭好，然后一起去收集今晚要用的食材吧。
t_en: Hehe, don't worry about that for now — let's get the tent ready then go find our dinner.

t_ch: 欸，好——那让我来试试吧！露营手册上相关的部分，我已经全都背下来了！
t_en: Sure! I can help out with the tent — I memorized that section in the camping guide.

t_ch: 好啊，那我先安装炉具好了。如果觉得拿不准，随时来问我哦。
t_en: Okay, then I'll go set up the stove. If you have any questions, just ask me.

t_ch: （咦？暖炉怎么启动不了……）
t_en: (Huh? Why isn't the heater working...?)

t_ch: （糟糕，查不出原因……）
t_en: (Darn, doesn't seem like an easy fix...)

t_ch: （问问佩拉吧……）
t_en: (Alright. I'll ask Pela...)

t_ch: 怎么固定不了……
t_en: Why can't I secure it...

t_ch: 奇怪…手册上是这样说的没错啊……
t_en: Weird... That's what the guide says...

t_ch: 啊，玲宝！你快来看看这是怎么回事！
t_en: Hey, Lynxy! Come and have a look at this!

t_ch: ——我明明已经按手册上说的来了，可这个帐篷怎么还是摇摇晃晃的……
t_en: I did everything according to the guide, but the tent's still wobbly...

t_ch: 检查一下。
t_en: Have a check.

t_ch: 唔，我来检查一下……
t_en: Mm, lemme have a check...

t_ch: 支架、横杆、缆绳…都没问题……
t_en: Main poles, check. Brow poles, check. Ropes, check...

t_ch: …啊，原来是地钉！
t_en: ...Ah, it's the pegs!

t_ch: 这样就好了，是地钉的问题——忘记说了，在这种积雪比较深的地方，要用实心的铅铁钉才行。
t_en: The pegs. I forgot to mention — thick snow needs leaded iron pegs.

t_ch: 原来如此。现在看起来确实稳固多了…不愧是玲宝！
t_en: Got it! It's definitely sturdier now... Nice job, Lynxy!

t_ch: 这就别夸啦…毕竟是我疏忽了。
t_en: You're too kind... My oversight.

t_ch: 呃，然后不巧的是——你能看看这个炉具吗？它好像坏掉了……
t_en: Uhh... I've got a question, too. Can you take a look at this stove? I think it's broken...

t_ch: 哎？好啊，让我看看。
t_en: Huh? Sure, let me take a look.

t_ch: 嗯…应该是地髓燃料的激活元件坏掉了。你有备用的吗？
t_en: Hmm... The Geomarrow fuel activation component probably stopped working. Do you have a spare one?

t_ch: 没有…姐姐和我说，这个是全新的……
t_en: No... Serval told me this was a brand-new stove...

t_ch: （该不会是我拿错了吧…那今天岂不是只能用地髓生火了？亏我特地跟姐姐要了这个……）
t_en: (Did I bring the wrong stove...? Does this mean we have to make a fire with Geomarrow? I specifically got this stove from Serval...)

t_ch: 没事没事，这种元件很常见，保不齐附近的废墟里就有能用的替换件呢。
t_en: That's okay. These components are really common. Maybe we can find a spare one in the ruins around here.

t_ch: 你先忙其他的吧，我去附近帮你找找——啊，顺便也收集一下食材！
t_en: You take it easy — I'll see if I can find one. Oh, and I'll keep an eye out for food too!

t_ch: …我、我也来！
t_en: ...I'll come with you!

t_ch: 收集食材是可以，但那个元件肯定很难找……
t_en: Finding food is easy, but finding that component is gonna be hard...

t_ch: 先找找看，实在不行就按你在手册上说的——砍柴生火好啦。
t_en: We'll do our best. If we can't find one, we'll just do what your guide says and chop wood to make a fire.

t_ch: 啊，其实我有备用的地髓块……
t_en: Oh, actually, I have some spare chunks of Geomarrow...

t_ch: 这座废墟里或许就能找到炉具的备用件。让我看看……
t_en: There might be spare stove parts in the ruin. Lemme see...

t_ch: 你不会是想钻进去吧……
t_en: Don't tell me you wanna crawl in there...

t_ch: 当然，毕竟想要的东西不可能自己钻出来嘛。
t_en: Of course I do. It's not like the stuff we need is gonna come crawling out.

t_ch: 那…注意安全。
t_en: In that case... be careful.

t_ch: 嘿咻，嘿咻……
找到什么了吗？
t_en: Did you find anything?

t_ch: 元件没找到，但是找到了这个…不知道能不能吃就是了。
t_en: I didn't find any components, but I got this... I don't know if we can still eat it...
Hmm...

t_ch: 可以哦，没有变质。
t_en: It hasn't decayed — it's edible!

t_ch: 啊？
t_en: Really?

t_ch: 多亏了寒潮啊…不然我们根本吃不到七百年前的生鱼片。
t_en: It's all thanks to the Eternal Freeze. We can eat raw fish from <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago!

t_ch: 七百年？！
t_en: <unbreak>700</unbreak>!?

t_ch: 咦？这个树干里……
t_en: Huh? What's in this tree trunk...

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: You found something?

t_ch: …好像有好吃的！
t_en: ...There's food in here!

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Really?

t_ch: 就这样…把它撬开……！
t_en: I'm gonna pry it open...

t_ch: …有了！
t_en: There!

t_ch: 呃，这是……
t_en: Uh... what exactly are—

t_ch: 是拟态雪蛞蝓。它会根据周围环境将自身重塑成与之接近的模样，以此伪装自己，非常可爱。
t_en: These are mimic snow slugs. They can change their appearance to match the external environment. They're really cute.

t_ch: 可这东西，看着不像很好吃的样子……
t_en: Yeah, but... we should put them back.

t_ch: 不。这种蛞蝓在火上烤过之后，口感会变得非常好——可能有点像…雪地鼠？
t_en: No, no! These slugs taste really good once they've been roasted... They kinda taste like... snow mice?

t_ch: …后面那个听上去也不能吃吧？！
t_en: That sounds even less appetizing!

t_ch: 这座雪堆里似乎有什么东西……
t_en: There's something in this snow drift...

t_ch: …哎？！我来挖就好了！你不用动手……
t_en: ...Huh!? I can do the digging! You don't need to...

t_ch: 这也是露营的一环嘛——就让我体验一下吧。
t_en: Come on, camping is about teamwork! Let me have a try.

t_ch: 啊…好吧。
t_en: Ah... Okay.

t_ch: 啊——果然有东西！
t_en: Ah! I found something!

t_ch: 这个…好像是萝卜？
t_en: Is this... a radish?

t_ch: 没错，这是雪地萝卜。味道甜甜的，很好吃……
t_en: Yep, that's a snow radish. They're really sweet and tasty...

t_ch: …不对。这应该是正在冬眠的雪地萝卜兔。
t_en: ...Actually... no. This is a hibernating snow radish rabbit.

t_ch: 啊？这原来是只兔子？
t_en: Huh? This is a rabbit?

t_ch: 是的，这种兔子的外形特别像雪地萝卜——耳朵是叶，身子是茎。它冬眠的时候会用土块包裹身体，看上去就和地里的萝卜没有任何区别了。
t_en: Yep. They look really similar to snow radishes. Their ears look like the leaves and their body looks like the radish bit. When they hibernate, they cover themselves with dirt, just like real radishes.

t_ch: 原来如此…那我们还是把它放回去吧。
t_en: I see... In that case, please tell me we can put it back?

t_ch: 嗯…这样对雪原生态比较好。
t_en: Yeah... It's better for the Snow Plains' ecosystem.

t_ch: 这个板条箱…看起来很可疑啊。说不定能找到炉具的替换件……
t_en: This crate looks promising. Maybe there are spare stove components inside...

t_ch: 那让我来打开它看看吧。
t_en: Let's open it up then.

t_ch: 哎，不用不用——玲宝你别操心，放着我来吧！
t_en: Ah! N—No! Don't worry about it, Lynxy! I'll manage!

t_ch: 咦…这是什么？
t_en: Uh...

t_ch: 这是…一捆红肠？
t_en: ...Are these sausages?

t_ch: 看起来是的，而且大概是不久前才被放在这里……
t_en: Sure looks like it... And they were probably placed here not long ago...

t_ch: …难道是贝洛伯格野人囤的食物吗？
t_en: ...Could it be the Belobog Caveman's food?

t_ch: 什、什么，贝洛伯格野人是什么？
t_en: ...B—Belobog Caveman?

t_ch: 是一种传说中的生物——它的外形介于人与猿之间，近似成年男性，毛发是深蓝色的；而且它神出鬼没，整个贝洛伯格都找不到能证明它存在的确切证据……
t_en: It's a legendary creature. It looks like something between a man and a monkey, roughly the same size as a man, with dark blue hair. Its activities are very mysterious, and no one in Belobog can find concrete evidence of its existence...

t_ch: 我也只是偶然看到过几次，但刚想认真拍个照的时候，就发现它已经消失不见了。
t_en: I've only chanced upon it a few times myself, but whenever I tried to take a photo of it, it had already run away.

t_ch: 我觉得…这捆红肠，有可能成为轰动贝洛伯格的科考发现！我们把它带回去吧。
t_en: I feel like... these sausages might constitute a great Belobogian scientific discovery! Let's bring them back with us.

t_ch: 啊…可是你看，这里好像写着字哎：
t_en: Ah! Hold on... There are some letters here.

t_ch: …「桑」什么什么「基」。中间看不清楚，但好像是个名字。
t_en: "SAM" something, "KOS" something... I can't read the rest, but it seems like a name.

t_ch: 这应该不是那个什么野人的屯粮吧…还是说，野人也会写字？
t_en: Guess it can't be the Belobog Caveman then... Do cavemen even know how to write?
*sigh* ...

t_ch: 别、别伤心！玲宝肯定还能找到其他证据的……
t_en: D—Don't worry Lynxy! I'm sure you'll get concrete proof one day...

t_ch: 至于这捆红肠…还是留在这里，等物主来拿吧。
t_en: Let's leave the sausages here, I think someone might be missing them if we take them.

t_ch: 这附近应该搜索得差不多了…佩拉，我们回去吧？
t_en: I think we've searched through everything here... Let's head back, Pela.

t_ch: 只能回去了…可惜没找到炉具的替换件。
t_en: *sigh* Okay... I feel bad that we didn't find a spare component.

t_ch: 没关系，我们用地髓生火就好了——一起回去吃饭吧。
t_en: It's fine, we'll just light a fire with Geomarrow... Let's go back and have some food.

t_ch: 佩拉……
t_en: Pela...

t_ch: 嗯？怎么了？
t_en: Hm? What's up?

t_ch: 其实…没有那个炉具也能生火做饭的。
t_en: We... don't really need that stove to cook.

t_ch: …我知道啊。反正也要出来收集食材嘛，顺便的事而已。
t_en: ...I know. But since we were looking for food, I figured we might as well try to fix the stove.

t_ch: 营地里好像有什么东西…我们小心一点。
t_en: I think there's something in the camp... Be careful.

t_ch: 难道是什么小动物吗？
t_en: Is it some kind of animal?

t_ch: …玲宝，等等。营地里的那个东西，是很危险的裂界生物。
t_en: ...Lynxy, wait. That thing in the camp is a dangerous Fragmentum creature.

t_ch: 嗯，我也看到了。可它好像没什么敌意，长得也挺可爱，圆滚滚的……
t_en: Mm, I see it too. But it doesn't seem aggressive... and it's all chubby and cute...

t_ch: 别被外表骗了。历年在裂界里失踪的银鬃铁卫，有两成就是因为不听指挥、擅自追逐这种裂界生物才没能归队的。
t_en: Don't be fooled by its appearance. About <unbreak>20%</unbreak> of our Silvermane Guard Fragmentum losses are a result of chasing this creature.

t_ch: 我们还没研究清楚这类生物的习性，但有一点很确定…它肯定具备某种蛊惑人心的能力，我们还是谨慎一点为好。
t_en: We haven't figured out everything about it yet, but there's one thing we're sure of... they have the power to control people. We need to be careful.

t_ch: 哎？但是这个小家伙上次还给了我件好东西呢，也没有伤害我的意思……
t_en: Huh? But this little buddy gave me something good last time, and it didn't hurt me...

t_ch: 那应该就是它蛊惑人心的伎俩了。还好你没遇到危险。
t_en: That must be the first step in their mind control process. You were lucky.

t_ch: 为了安全着想，我们还是消灭它吧——裂界生物是贝洛伯格的敌人，不值得信任。
t_en: We should defeat it just to be safe. Fragmentum creatures are Belobog's enemies — they shouldn't be trusted.

t_ch: 啊，但是……
t_en: Ah, but...

t_ch: 什么？
t_en: Mm?

t_ch: 之前我都没来得及给它拍照，但现在是个好机会……
t_en: I didn't even get to take a photo of it last time. Now's a good chance...

t_ch: 至少让我拍张照吧，佩拉——身为科考人员，这也是我的义务。
t_en: Can I at least take a picture, Pela? That's also my job as a researcher.

t_ch: …我明白了。但快门的声音和闪光灯很有可能会激怒它……
t_en: ...I understand, but the sound of the shutter and the camera bulb might send it into a frenzy...

t_ch: …啊，它注意到我们了。
t_en: ...Ah, it noticed us.

t_ch: 它可能正在寻找袭击我们的机会…小心。
t_en: It might be looking for an opportunity to attack. Be careful!

t_ch: 总算是拍到了……
t_en: Finally got a picture...

t_ch: 它好像消失了。
t_en: It disappeared.

t_ch: 它好像消失了…是逃走了吗？
t_en: It disappeared... Did it run away?

t_ch: 嗯…那个小家伙的习性就是如此。只要受到惊吓，它就会以一种奇妙的方式立刻消失不见。
t_en: Yeah... that's the nature of these little things. They disappear in a flash when they get scared.

t_ch: 它有可能还在周围。
t_en: Maybe it's still around somewhere.

t_ch: 它不见了…玲宝，小心偷袭。
t_en: It disappeared... Lynxy, be on the lookout for an ambush.

t_ch: 不用紧张啦，佩拉。那个小家伙的习性就是如此——只要受到惊吓，它就会以一种奇妙的方式消失不见。
t_en: Don't worry, Pela... that's the nature of these little things. They disappear in a flash when they get scared.

t_ch: 这是我经过长期观察总结出的经验。至于那些失踪的铁卫…我想应该是在追逐中迷了路，所以才都没能全身而退吧。
t_en: That's my conclusion from my long-term observations. As for those lost Guards... maybe they were chasing these little creatures and couldn't find their way back.

t_ch: 对不起，是我太敏感了……
t_en: Sorry. Maybe I was overreacting...

t_ch: 不用道歉，谨慎一点是好事。
t_en: Don't be sorry. It pays to be careful.

t_ch: 总之，危机解除——我们可以好好准备露营餐了……
t_en: Anyway, crisis resolved! We can now make some food...

t_ch: …咦？那个小家伙好像掉了什么东西？
t_en: ...Huh? Our little buddy seems to have dropped something.

t_ch: 呼…这样就算是把它赶走了——虽然不知道去了哪里，但一时半会大概不会出现了吧。
t_en: Phew... Hopefully it won't be coming back any time soon.

t_ch: 这次也莫名其妙地消失了……
t_en: It disappeared again...

t_ch: 应该只是利用了裂界的某种性质吧。你很在意它去哪里了吗？
t_en: It must have used some Fragmentum loophole to escape. Do you really want to take after it, Lynxy?

t_ch: 没，只是有点好奇。它以前受到惊吓时，好像也是通过这种奇妙的方式消失不见的。
t_en: No, just a bit curious. But these guys do disappear in a flash when they get scared.

t_ch: 总之，危机解除——我们可以好好准备露营餐了……
t_en: Anyway, crisis resolved! We can now make some food...

t_ch: …咦？那个小家伙好像掉了什么东西？
t_en: ...Huh? Our little buddy seems to have dropped something.

t_ch: 咦？这是……
t_en: Huh? This is...

t_ch: 太好了！玲宝，你快看——居然是地髓激活元件！没想到在这里找到了！
t_en: Awesome! Lynxy, look! It's a Geomarrow Activation Component! I never thought we'd find one here!

t_ch: 你呢玲宝，找到什么好东西了吗？
t_en: What about you, Lynxy? Did you find anything good?

t_ch: …啊！没、没什么。好像只是一些古董……
t_en: ...Ah! N—Nothing! Just some old stuff...

t_ch: 能、能找到这个零件真是太好了！快让我们把炉子修好吧——
t_en: I—It's great we finally found the component! Let's go fix the stove!

t_ch: 嗯？玲宝…你是不是有什么话想说？
t_en: Huh? Lynxy... is something the matter?

t_ch: …没有没有，是你的错觉！
t_en: ...Nope, nope, it's all your imagination!

t_ch: …好吧，不逗你玩啦。你先休息一下，让我来看看这座炉子吧。
t_en: ...Oh, uh... Why don't you take a break — I'll have a look at this stove.

t_ch: 嗯，好啦。
t_en: Okay, all done.

t_ch: …这莫非是什么魔法？！我怎么什么问题都看不出来……
t_en: What is this magic? I couldn't figure out the problem at all...

t_ch: 不是什么高深的技巧啦，我只是先前跟着希露瓦学了两手而已。
t_en: No magic here. Just a trick or two I learned from Serval.

t_ch: 姐姐……
t_en: My sister...

t_ch: 是啊，就是她。怎么了吗？
t_en: Yep, that's her. What's the matter?

t_ch: 啊…没什么。只是，偶尔…挺羡慕姐姐的，毕竟她什么都会……
t_en: Ah... nothing. Just... sometimes I'm a bit jealous of Serval, you know? She knows everything...

t_ch: …你不也是嘛。
t_en: Hehe, same as you, then.
...Huh?

t_ch: 你想，极地探险专家和机械专家不都是专家嘛。在我看来，你和希露瓦一样厉害哦。
t_en: I'm serious! Outdoor explorer, mechanic — they're both experts in their field, right? I think you two are awesome.

t_ch: 而且，玲宝想从她那里学点什么的话应该不难吧？她肯定很乐意教你——毕竟你是她亲妹妹嘛。
t_en: Anyway, it wouldn't be hard for you to get her to teach you something. You're her sister, she'd be happy to teach you.

t_ch: 话是这么说没错……
t_en: You say that, but...

t_ch: …先不聊这个啦。天色不早了，我们开始做饭吧。
t_en: ...Never mind. It's getting late. Let's cook something.

t_ch: 好！我最期待的环节终于——啊，不是，我最期待的当然还是看极光啦！
t_en: Yay! That's my favorite part... Wait, no, my favorite part is watching the aurora!

t_ch: 总之，我们先清点下食材吧。
t_en: Anyways, let's take a look at what ingredients we have.

t_ch: （根据经验，每种食材都有自己独特的功效，组合在一起更会有意想不到的功效出现……）
t_en: (Every ingredient has its own effect, and combining them will create unexpected results...)

t_ch: （究竟会产生怎样的效果呢？随意试试吧。）
t_en: (What kind of effects are they gonna make? Let's just give it a try.)

t_ch: 啊…是七百年前的生鱼片。
t_en: Ah... <unbreak>700</unbreak>-year-old raw fish.

t_ch: 就不用再强调一遍七百年了吧……
t_en: You don't have to emphasize the "<unbreak>700</unbreak> years" part, y'know...

t_ch: 年份越长越稀有嘛。而且还是佩拉你特地钻进废墟里找到的……
t_en: The older, the rarer! Plus, you had to enter that ruin for it — even more special...

t_ch: …这个也不用再特地强调一遍啦！
t_en: You don't have to emphasize that either!

t_ch: 那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——嘿嘿，让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
t_en: Then let's just say it'll be tonight's main course, haha. Time to show you my culinary skills!

t_ch: 那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
t_en: Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...

t_ch: 哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
t_en: It's no problem! Leave it to me.

t_ch: 锵锵——霜纹鲑面包做好了！
t_en: Ta-da. Frostweave Salmon Bread is ready!

t_ch: 啊…好香！我要开动了——！
t_en: Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!

t_ch: 从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
t_en: You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...

t_ch: 啊…是可爱的拟态雪蛞蝓。
t_en: Ah... Cute mimic snow slug.

t_ch: 我们真的要吃掉它吗……
t_en: Are we really going to eat that...?

t_ch: 别害怕，虽然看上去不怎么美味——但只要尝试过一次，你肯定会爱上这种食物的。
t_en: Don't worry. It may not look tasty, but I guarantee you'll fall in love with it on the first bite.

t_ch: 说到底，它根本不是食物吧……
t_en: I still don't believe this is supposed to be food...

t_ch: 那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——嘿嘿，让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
t_en: Then let's just say it'll be tonight's main course, haha. Time to show you my culinary skills!

t_ch: 那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
t_en: Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...

t_ch: 哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
t_en: It's no problem! Leave it to me.

t_ch: 锵锵——岩烧山珍串做好了！
t_en: Ta-da. The Stone-Roasted Meat Skewer is ready!

t_ch: 啊…好香！我要开动了——！
t_en: Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!

t_ch: 从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
t_en: You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...

t_ch: 啊…是七百年前的生鱼片，还有可爱的拟态雪蛞蝓。
t_en: Ah... raw fish from <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago and some cute mimic snow slug.

t_ch: 感觉…好像都不太适合放进嘴里啊。
t_en: I don't think... either is edible...

t_ch: 没关系，做成火锅就没问题了。只要加入奶油和饼干碎，再加入我准备好的鲱鱼罐头……
t_en: Don't worry. We'll make them into a hotpot. Just add cream, biscuit crumbs, and the canned sardines I brought...

t_ch: 鲱鱼罐头也要加进去吗？！
t_en: You're putting canned sardines into a hotpot!? Please don't say that...

t_ch: 那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——就让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
t_en: Well then, this will be the main course for tonight — I'll show you what I can do as a chef!

t_ch: 那个…要不让我来做吧！玲宝你就休息一下……
t_en: Um... Why don't I cook tonight? You can take a break...

t_ch: 哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
t_en: Come on, it's fine. Just leave it to me.

t_ch: 锵锵——超级美味的雪原大乱炖做好啦！
t_en: Ta-da! The super delicious Snow Plains Combo Stew is ready!

t_ch: 啊…好香！我要开动了——！
t_en: Ah... It smells so good! I'm gonna dig in!

t_ch: 从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
t_en: You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...

t_ch: 吃得好饱…现在，我们只要等极光出来就好了吧？
t_en: I'm so full... guess now we just wait for the light show.

t_ch: 应该再过不久就会出来了。在那之前…就聊聊天吧。
t_en: The aurora should start soon. Before that... let's just chat.

t_ch: 佩拉…为什么忽然想一起来露营？
t_en: Pela... Why did you suddenly want to come camping?

t_ch: 哎？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 你以前不是说过嘛——「平时太忙了，休息时间只想瘫在床上」……
t_en: Well, aren't you always saying how you just wanna lie in bed when you get off work?

t_ch: 啊！我是不是给你添麻烦了？对不起……
t_en: Ah! Sorry, I hope this trip didn't surprise you...

t_ch: 哪有什么添麻烦一说。虽然我确实不喜欢和人打交道，但这毕竟是和好朋友一起露营嘛。
t_en: No, no! I mean, sure, I'm not the most sociable of people, but I love camping with a good friend.

t_ch: 我很开心。一点都不麻烦。
t_en: I had a great time — it's been a lot of fun.

t_ch: 你老是这样——这次露营也是。从开始到现在，你就一直在揽活。
t_en: You're always like this. Even on this camping trip, you keep trying to do things.

t_ch: 真的没这个必要啊，交给我就好了嘛。露营就是要放松，不用老是紧绷绷的。
t_en: You really don't need to, just leave it to me. Camping is about relaxing — no need to be so tense.

t_ch: …是啊。
t_en: ...I know.

t_ch: 但是——我觉得这次露营还是很开心的！毕竟终于能试着做自己想做的事了……
t_en: It's just, I was really getting into the camping! I felt like I finally got around to doing the things I always wanted to...

t_ch: 给《奇谭》画的那些漫画不算吗？
t_en: So all those comics you drew for the Tales series didn't count?

t_ch: 嗯。毕竟还得藏着掖着，总觉得不自在。
t_en: Uhh... I have to hide those from other people. I get a little embarrassed.

t_ch: 你太在意别人的看法了。
t_en: You care about other people's opinions too much.

t_ch: 也许吧。要是我也能像你一样就好了。
t_en: I suppose. I wish I could be more like you...

t_ch: 我啊…也没什么好羡慕的。
t_en: I... I'm not as cool as you think.

t_ch: 我只是有点受不了哥哥姐姐…受不了他们总把我当成小孩子。
t_en: I don't know how to handle my brother and sister... They keep treating me as a kid.

t_ch: 他们两个都是很厉害，很优秀的人…但也正是因为这样，和他们相处的时候我总会感到压力……
t_en: They're both really capable and awesome people... Which is why I feel really pressured when I'm with them...

t_ch: 我明明已经长大了…已经有足够的能力去做自己想做的事了……
t_en: I'm already a grown-up... I have the capacity to do what I want to do...

t_ch: 为什么他们就是不能停止操心，让我放手去做呢？
t_en: Why can't they just stop worrying and let me do what I want?

t_ch: …家人就是这样的呀。
t_en: ...That's how families are.

t_ch: …啊，对不起，不该说这个的。我有点太激动了。
t_en: ...Ah, sorry. I shouldn't talk about this. I was getting carried away.

t_ch: 没事没事，反正我连她的样子都没见过……
t_en: It's okay... It's not like I even know what she looked like...

t_ch: 极光啊…什么时候才会出现呢？
t_en: So... when's the aurora due...?

t_ch: 玲可，当心——有怪物靠近了！
t_en: *gasp* Careful, Lynx — there are monsters coming!

t_ch: 你为什么会在这里啊？！
t_en: How did it get here!?

t_ch: 不管怎么样…先专注于战斗吧。
t_en: Let's focus on the fight first.

t_ch: 没想到裂界怪物会突然出现……
t_en: These Fragmentum monsters are coming out of thin air...

t_ch: 大概是被我们的炉光吸引来的吧。星核危机明明都已经解除了，怪物怎么还是到处都是啊……
t_en: They were probably attracted by the stove. The Stellaron crisis is over, why are there still so many monsters?

t_ch: 裂界影响的消除需要时间。
t_en: It takes time for the Fragmentum's influence to fade.

t_ch: 喔，原来如此……
t_en: Ah. I see...

t_ch: 不用担心，因为有我在！
t_en: With me around, there's no need to worry!

t_ch: 你突然耍什么帅啊……
t_en: Hmph, we could've handled it...

t_ch: 等等，不对——你为什么会在这里啊？！
t_en: Wait — where did you come from all of a sudden!?

t_ch: 佩拉，这个人是谁？
t_en: Pela? Who is this?

t_ch: 呃…{M#他}{F#她}就是那个拯救了贝洛伯格的大英雄{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Um... This is the trailblazer — the savior of Belobog.

t_ch: 原来如此。谢谢你，不光拯救了贝洛伯格，这次还救了我们两个。
t_en: I see. Well, in that case, thanks for saving us — not to mention Belobog.

t_ch: 不过，其实我也想问…大英雄为什么会出现在这里？
t_en: So, what's a big hero like you doing out here?

t_ch: 你的哥哥姐姐派我来的。
t_en: Serval and Gepard sent me.

t_ch: 哎…我就知道。
t_en: *sigh*...I knew it.

t_ch: 呃…这个……
t_en: Um... Err...

t_ch: 算了…我已经能猜到个大概了。是哥哥姐姐找你来保护我们的吧？
t_en: Never mind... I can take a guess. Serval and Gepard sent you to protect us, right?

t_ch: …他们总是这样。做那两个人的妹妹，想拥有点私人空间真的很难。
t_en: They're always like this. It's impossible to get some private time as their younger sister.

t_ch: 我也觉得他们的做法不好。
t_en: I didn't exactly see eye to eye with them...

t_ch: 那你就更不应该出现在这里了啊……
t_en: Then why did you still come here...

t_ch: 家人就是这样的。
t_en: That's how families are.

t_ch: 没错……
t_en: Yeah...

t_ch: 等一下，这不是我刚才的台词吗？
t_en: Hold on, isn't that what I just said?

t_ch: 原来你小时候是这个样子啊？
t_en: You were like this when you were little?

t_ch: 现在不是问这个的时候吧……
t_en: This probably isn't the best time to bring that up...

t_ch: 好啦好啦。说到底还是因为哥哥姐姐太爱操心，况且{NICKNAME}也救了我们……
t_en: Alright, alright. It's all because Serval and Gepard are worrywarts. Besides, you did save us...

t_ch: 既然你跟了我们一路，想必也知道我们来这里露营是为了什么——
t_en: Since you followed us all the way here, you probably know why we're out camping today...

t_ch: 留下来，我们一起看极光吧。
t_en: Stay and watch the aurora with us.

t_ch: 深夜……
t_en: At night...

t_ch: 应该快要到极光出现的时间了……
t_en: It's about time for it to appear...

t_ch: …喂，玲宝玲宝！你快看！
t_en: Hey! Lynxy! Look!

t_ch: 跟我来——这边。
t_en: Come this way.
Wow...

t_ch: 星核事件之后…这应该是规模最大的一次极光了。
t_en: This is the largest aurora since the Stellaron crisis passed.

t_ch: 我们很幸运。
t_en: We're really lucky to see it.

t_ch: 是啊……
t_en: Yeah...

t_ch: …很幸运。
t_en: ...really lucky.

t_ch: 真好呀，吃了玲宝做的饭，还看到了极光…这次雪原之行，圆满结束啦——！
t_en: So awesome... I got to taste Lynxy's cooking and see the aurora... This Snow Plains adventure was the best!

t_ch: 佩拉看起来很开心。
t_en: You look really happy.

t_ch: 哎？我……
t_en: Huh? Me?

t_ch: 咳…也没有很开心啦，真的。
t_en: Ahem! I—I'm not THAT happy. I, wh—what I mean is, uh...

t_ch: 实话实说不好吗！
t_en: Say what's on your mind!

t_ch: 对呀。实话实说嘛，佩拉。
t_en: Yeah, go for it, Pela.

t_ch: 玲可会伤心的…
t_en: Lynx will be upset...

t_ch: 哎？！对、对不起！
t_en: Huh!? I... I hope not...

t_ch: 放心吧，不会的。我能感受到佩拉真实的心情。
t_en: It's okay. I won't be sad. I understand what Pela really feels.

t_ch: 和我一起露营，你不满意？
t_en: You weren't just here for the camping?

t_ch: 本来我是想承认的…现在突然没有那种欲望了。
t_en: I was going to say that... but now I suddenly don't want to.

t_ch: 我能感受到佩拉真实的心情，你没必要藏啦。
t_en: I understand what Pela really feels. You don't need to hide it.

t_ch: 好吧好吧…确实是一次开心的经历。多亏了玲宝…还有你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: *sigh* It was a great experience... thanks to you Lynxy... not to mention you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 那，接下来怎么说——就这么解散吗？还是说，晚上要不要再约个夜宵？
t_en: Anyway, what now? Back home? Wanna go out for a midnight snack later?

t_ch: 好啊。听说行政区南边新开了家不错的肉排馆，正好我们一起去试试看吧。
t_en: We can! I heard a pretty good steak place opened up in the south of the Administrative District. We can go try it out together.

t_ch: 听着不错～那就这么定了。现在暂时解散，夜里再见咯。
t_en: Sounds good! That's settled then. Let's part ways for now and rendezvous later tonight.

t_ch: 啊，佩拉！稍等一下……
t_en: Ah, Pela! Hold on...

t_ch: 嗯？怎么了？
t_en: Mm? What's up?

t_ch: 这个…给你。
t_en: This... is for you.

t_ch: 这…这是？
t_en: What... is this?

t_ch: 修好炉具之前，我在地上找到的——我猜，大概是那个圆滚滚的裂界生物留下的。
t_en: I found this on the ground before you fixed the stove. I guess that Fragmentum creature dropped it.

t_ch: 我觉得…你还是亲自确认一下比较好。
t_en: I think... it might be best if you check it out yourself.

t_ch: 「佩妮娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜」……
t_en: "Penya... Sergeyevna..."

t_ch: …我知道啦。谢谢你，玲宝。
t_en: ...I see. Thank you, Lynxy.

t_ch: 那…我们晚些时候就在这里会合吧，我先失陪了。
t_en: ...Let's meet up here later tonight... I better get going.
Mm...

t_ch: （去机械屋找朗道姐弟聊聊吧……）
t_en: (I should go talk to Gepard and Serval at the workshop...)

t_ch: 玲可好不容易回来一趟…怎么还是不愿意见见我们呢。
t_en: Between expeditions, it's always a challenge to make time with Lynx... but why doesn't she want to talk to us?

t_ch: 嗐，别急。这不是还有{NICKNAME}帮忙嘛。
t_en: Calm down. We've got {NICKNAME} to help us.

t_ch: 哟，{NICKNAME}，我和老弟刚刚才聊到你呢。
t_en: Hey, {NICKNAME}! We were just talking about you.

t_ch: 玲可的那件事…怎么样了？
t_en: How was it... with Lynx?

t_ch: 向朗道姐弟汇报了雪原中的见闻……
t_en: Tells the Landaus everything that happened in the Snow Plains...

t_ch: 原来那个「陌生人」就是佩拉啊……
t_en: So, that "stranger" was Pela...

t_ch: 该怎么说呢…这倒确实是玲宝的风格。
t_en: What can I say... Sounds like a Lynxy expedition alright.

t_ch: 你们不会对她生气吧？
t_en: You're not gonna get angry at her, right?

t_ch: 怎么会呢——只要玲宝她能保护好自己，不管做什么，我都支持！
t_en: No way. As long as Lynxy can protect herself, I'll be supportive in all her ventures!

t_ch: 姐姐这次说得倒没错…这是玲可自己的选择，我们不会对她生气的。
t_en: Serval is right this time... This was Lynx's own choice. We won't be upset with her.
